reproducible_artifact: A team-level new-framework-evaluation template: every new framework or architecture proposal is met with a two-paragraph written response covering (a) what would be true if we adopted this, (b) the cost, (c) the trigger that would cause us to reconsider. Sprint capacity is not allocated to evaluation until the trigger is met or the proposal is filed.
verdict_reason: Reproducible at team practice level. The implication field operationalizes: count proposals that landed vs those that produced roadmap change, subtract those situationally-required, the remainder measures team buddhi capture. Falsifiable, measurable, no metaphysics required. Pass.
